title: Marlins captain ends career on high
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Marlins kicked off the 2025 rugby season with an impressive victory over the Pro Stars from George at the Van Riebeeck Stadium in Mossel Bay on Saturday, 12 April.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Marlins kicked off the 2025 rugby season with an impressive victory over the Pro Stars from George at the Van Riebeeck Stadium in Mossel Bay on Saturday, 12 April."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"First teamThe Marlins' first team wasted little time in the first half, converting a penalty kick within the opening minutes of the match.","html":"First team
The Marlins' first team wasted little time in the first half, converting a penalty kick within the opening minutes of the match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PHOTO GALLERY: Marlins secure commanding victory against Pro Stars","html":"PHOTO GALLERY: Marlins secure commanding victory against Pro Stars"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This opened the floodgates of tries which found the home side leading 34-0 at half-time.The second half saw the Marlins continue the dominant display of set pieces and scrums, ending the match with a 70-0 victory over the Pro Stars.","html":"This opened the floodgates of tries which found the home side leading 34-0 at half-time.
The second half saw the Marlins continue the dominant display of set pieces and scrums, ending the match with a 70-0 victory over the Pro Stars."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bittersweet victoryJC Bernardo, captaining the team, has announced his retirement from rugby due to medical concerns.","html":"Bittersweet victory
JC Bernardo, captaining the team, has announced his retirement from rugby due to medical concerns."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bernardo led the Marlins throughout the 2024 season and during this past weekend's season opener, scored an impressive four tries during the match against the Pro Stars, securing the title of Man of the Match.","html":"Bernardo led the Marlins throughout the 2024 season and during this past weekend's season opener, scored an impressive four tries during the match against the Pro Stars, securing the title of Man of the Match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Second teamThe Marlins' second team secured a 17-12 win over the Pro Stars.","html":"Second team
The Marlins' second team secured a 17-12 win over the Pro Stars."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The home side's scrum dominance over the Pro Stars set the tone throughout the match and it delivered some hard-hitting rugby."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both sides missed opportunities due to handling errors within five metres of the try line. The Marlins showed strong defensive play as the Pro Stars pushed the five-metre mark multiple times.","html":"Both sides missed opportunities due to handling errors within five metres of the try line. The Marlins showed strong defensive play as the Pro Stars pushed the five-metre mark multiple times."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Strong winds hassled both sides during lineout throws and during conversion kicks, which saw both sides only converting one try each.","html":"Strong winds hassled both sides during lineout throws and during conversion kicks, which saw both sides only converting one try each."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Marlins captain ends career on high
